name: Minigame Game
short_description: Minigame Game is a first-person focused minigame collection that supports anywhere from 2-16 players.
detailed_description:
Minigame Game is a first-person focused minigame collection that supports anywhere from 2-16 players. Grab your weapons and enter the "Minigame Game" arcade!

Test your skills!

Shoot, bunnyhop, swing, and dance your way to victory in a variety of minigames designed to put your classic FPS skills to the test. Featuring 35+ minigames that will pit you with and against your friends.

Get the high score!

Whoever has the most points at the end of each minigame playlist is crowned the winner of the arcade. Your score and achievements are tracked to unlock cosmetics that you can show off with the Arcade Pass!

Level up!

As you level up you’ll be able to choose from an ever-increasing selection of minigames. From fist fights and rocket jumping to shooting glass floors and swinging through space, there’s a minigame for everyone!

Play For Free!

Join your friends and others online at any time! Whether on the official Minigame Game servers or in a custom lobby, join others in the chaos that is Minigame Game for free!
